videos.headline: Broncos' Modster makes leaping TD grab just before half
videos.description: With under a minute remaining in the first half, Brett Rypien airs it out and connects with Sean Modster for a 24-yard touchdown, giving Boise State a 17-7 lead going into halftime.

videos.headline: BYU's Jones makes one-handed INT
videos.description: Grant Jones jumps the receiver's route and reaches out with one hand to pick off Brett Rypien's pass.

videos.headline: Boise State scores out of the Wildcat
videos.description: Lined up in the wildcat formation, Alexander Mattison takes the snap and beats the BYU defenders to the pylon for a 12-yard touchdown run, tying the game at 7-7.

videos.headline: Boise State picks off pass, returns it into BYU territory
videos.description: Tanner Mangum's pass is intercepted by Kekoa Nawahine who returns it 51 yards and all the way down to the BYU 22-yard line, leading to a Broncos field goal.

videos.headline: BYU fails to convert on 4th Down
videos.description: The Cougars go for it on 4th-and-1 from their own 48-yard line, but Tanner Mangum airs it out and can't connect with Jonah Trinnaman, resulting in a turnover on downs.

videos.headline: Broncos' Vander Esch gets INT, earns turnover belt
videos.description: Leighton Vander Esch intercepts Tanner Mangum's pass and returns it back 36 yards. To celebrate forcing a turnover, Vander Esch is given a championship belt to wear on the sidelines.

videos.headline: Cougars strike first on Tolutau's TD scamper
videos.description: Ula Tolutau takes a handoff, makes a sharp cut, and stretches into the end for a 3-yard touchdown.

videos.headline: Boise State's Mattison lowers shoulder to convert at goal line
videos.description: Alexander Mattison caps an 82-yard drive and scores from two yards out, giving the Broncos a 24-7 lead.

videos.headline: Harsin: Boise State 'has momentum going into second half'
videos.description: Broncos coach Bryan Harsin says the team's touchdown just before halftime has his team feeling confident.

videos.headline: Rypien: 'Felt good to get monkey off my back' with TD pass
videos.description: After failing to throw a touchdown pass through four games, Boise State QB Brett Rypien says he was relieved to finally get his first touchdown of the season.

videos.headline: Offensive balance key to Boise State's victory over BYU
videos.description: Dusty Dvoracek and Adam Amin cite the Broncos' ability to do damage both through the air and on the ground as the reason for their 24-7 win over the Cougars.
